# Claude / Anthropic Tools

Track Claude tool-use patterns relevant to sandboxed tool execution.

## What To Cover

- Tool input schema
- Tool use and tool result loop
- Error handling
- Streaming tool use
- Computer/tool safety notes where relevant
- Model behavior around failed tools

## Cookbook Examples

- `examples/claude-tools/http-tool-sandbox`

## Checklist

- [ ] Minimal tool declaration
- [ ] HTTP sandbox adapter
- [ ] Structured tool result example
- [ ] Structured error example
- [ ] Timeout behavior
- [ ] Tool-call ID preservation
- [ ] Streaming behavior
- [ ] Session/state notes
